sections.title: Initial dialogue after Horror from the Deep

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Ah yes, I wanted to talk to you about the casket you found on that monster's corpse...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see you managed to escape from those monsters intact!

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: It seems I was not as injured as I thought I was after all! I must thank you again for all of your help! Now, about that casket you found on that monster's corpse...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have it here. You said you might be able to tell me something about it...

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: I can indeed! Here, let me have a closer look... Yes! There is something written on it!

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: It is very faint, however... Can you read it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think it says... Saradomin...

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Are you sure? I mean, are you REALLY sure? Maybe you'd better look again...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, it definitely says Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: I think you're right! Hand it here, and let's see what's inside!

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Wow! It's a Holy Book of Saradomin! I thought these things had all vanished! Well, it's all yours, I hope you appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, it definitely says Zamorak.

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: I think you're right! Hand it here, and let's see what's inside!

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Wow! It's an Unholy Book of Zamorak! I thought these things had all vanished! Well, it's all yours, I hope you appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, it definitely says Guthix.

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: I think you're right! Hand it here, and let's see what's inside!

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Wow! It's Guthix's Book of Balance! I thought these things had all vanished! Well, it's all yours, I hope you appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wish it were one of the other gods. I'd prefer my reward to be aligned to a different god, not Saradomin, Zamorak or Guthix.

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: The sea's always washing up interesting stuff around my lighthouse. Perhaps I'll find something more suitable for you in future.

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: For now, this casket definitely says Saradomin, Zamorak or Guthix. Which do you think it is?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think it says... Zamorak...

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Are you sure? I mean, are you REALLY sure? Maybe you'd better look again...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think it says... Guthix...

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Are you sure? I mean, are you REALLY sure? Maybe you'd better look again...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I never had any casket from that monster...?

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Why, of course you did! You dropped it and I picked it up! Now, free up some inventory space so we can see what's inside it.

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Why, of course you did! You dropped it and I picked it up! I have it right here!

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Now let's have a look at it... There is some writing on it, but it is very faint... Can you make it out?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have it stored safely.

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Well, bring it here and let's take a look at it!

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Hello again, adventurer. What brings you this way?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I see your wares?

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: Sure thing! I think you'll find my prices are remarkable!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you found any more prayerbooks?

lines.speaker: Jossik
lines.text: It's amazing how things like that keep washing up on the shore in caskets. Take a look at what I've got...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, really. Good bye.
